reason: Modifying the mount options for /home changes filesystem execution behavior. This is classified as a filesystem change, which per policy is marked as too_dangerous_to_remediate because it can break user applications or scripts that rely on executing binaries from /home and may require a reboot.
estimated_impact: reboot required; filesystems affected; potential execution failures for user binaries; possible disruption of services that rely on /home executables; requires system reboot or remount to take effect
